impl.spec_text:
proof fn test(x: int, y: int, z:int, m:int) by(integer_ring)
            requires (x-y) % m == 0
            ensures (x*z + y*z) % m < 0 //FAILS (not supported)
        {}
impl.impl_text:
proof fn test(x: int, y: int, z:int, m:int) by(integer_ring)
            requires (x-y) % m == 0
            ensures (x*z + y*z) % m < 0 //FAILS (not supported)
        {}
